narrative:
Precinct Prairie Township (precinct in Holmes County) has 1,097 registered voters, with 57.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.2 percentage points.
